description: Global story counter for sequential user story IDs. Existing stories keep their current IDs. New stories use US-{nextId} format.
existingPrefixes: US-107 through US-112 (Phase 1 Alert Thresholds — B-028)
US-113 through US-120 (Phase 2 Alert Thresholds — B-029)
US-129 through US-135 (Server Analysis Pipeline — B-031)
US-136 through US-138 (PID Polling + Data Architecture — B-032)
notes: New stories created after PMO migration use sequential IDs: US-101, US-102, etc. This prevents prefix collisions across features.
